name: sema-sidlak
description: An MLOps pipeline for semantic segmentation combining SAM 3.1 (Segment Anything Model) and YOLOv8 for automated track annotation. Engineered for high-performance visual analysis of racing circuits, implementing a production-ready workflow for real-time segmentation and object detection.

name: IskoChatAI
description: A specialized RAG-based chatbot designed to navigate the complexities of Philippine scholarship and enrollment processes. Engineered a system that retrieves real-time data from Google Docs and Custom Search APIs to provide accurate, 'Taglish' responses.

name: Underwater Sealife Crab and Solid Waste Detection (YOLOv8)
description: Freelance project implementing a real-time object detection system using YOLOv8 to identify and differentiate between marine life (crabs) and anthropogenic solid waste in underwater environments. Trained on a public 10k image dataset to address the visual challenges of aquatic environments.

name: Plant Disease Classification using ResNet
description: A ResNet-powered deep learning project that automates the classification of 15 plant disease categories across peppers, potatoes, and tomatoes. Leveraging Residual Learning and Computer Vision, the model achieves 96% accuracy, providing a high-precision solution for early crop diagnosis.

name: Handwritten Baybayin Classification using Custom CNN
description: A custom CNN in PyTorch that classifies handwritten Baybayin script, a traditional pre-colonial Philippine writing system. Using an EMNIST-style dataset, the model handles complex stroke patterns and diacritics (kudlits), achieving an overall accuracy of 89.5%.

name: Unsupervised KNN Recommender System
description: An Unsupervised KNN Recommender System that identifies similar weaponry within the game Terraria. Built with Scikit-Learn, the model analyzes weapon attributes to suggest mathematically 'near' alternatives to a given item. Includes extensive Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA).

name: PUP Graduate School Alumni Website
description: Freelance project as a core Frontend Developer in a three-person team. Co-engineered and deployed a high-impact alumni portal designed for Tracer Study Research. The platform successfully onboarded 130+ alumni, earning client praise for its intuitive UI and data collection efficiency.

name: Tinig Manila: AI Voice Hotline for Filipino Senior Citizens
description: A toll-free conversational AI hotline that helps Filipino senior citizens access eGovPH government services in natural Tagalog/Taglish. Built as a monorepo: a Node.js/Express backend with a transport-agnostic agent layer (Groq llama-3.3-70b for replies, llama-3.1-8b-instant for identity extraction + analytics) wired to Twilio's Filipino TTS/STT for phone callers, plus a React/Vite dashboard streaming live transcripts, caller profiles, and sentiment analytics over Socket.io. Stays entirely on free tiers (Groq + Twilio trial) while supporting fuzzy Tagalog name/birthdate matching against a mock eGovPH database.

name: Kiro: Immersive Portfolio for AI/ML Engineering
description: A high-performance, visually immersive portfolio engineered to showcase advanced AI and Computer Vision research. Developed with Next.js 15 and GSAP, it features a complex 3D orbiting collage in the Hero section, a 'glass-morphic' UI utilizing refractive shaders, and a fully responsive layout. The project emphasizes a professional-grade aesthetic to highlight technical expertise in deep learning, face-embedding models, and RAG systems.

name: Luna: Dog Health Expert RAG System
description: An advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system providing expert-level advice on canine health, behavior, and nutrition. Engineered a high-performance pipeline that ingests authoritative medical guidelines (AAHA, AVMA, WSAVA) into a ChromaDB vector store. Features a FastAPI backend and a Streamlit UI, achieving 100% context precision by utilizing Gemini 2.5 Flash for nuanced, safety-first response generation with integrated veterinary disclaimers.

name: Data Structures & Algorithms Visualizer
description: An immersive Data Structures and Algorithms visualizer that transforms abstract computer science concepts into interactive, game-like experiences. Built with React and Tailwind CSS, it features dynamic visualizations for key data structures (Stacks, Queues, Binary Search Trees) and sorting algorithms (Quick, Merge, Heap, etc.). The application incorporates a rich aesthetic using assets and soundtracks from Stardew Valley, Mario, and Streetfighter, enhancing user engagement through gamified learning and the Web Audio API.

name: PUP SIS Grades & Contact Grabber
description: A specialized Chrome extension engineered to automate the extraction and analysis of academic records from the Polytechnic University of the Philippines Student Information System (PUPSIS). It features a robust web scraping engine that parses complex SIS tables to calculate GWA (General Weighted Average) in real-time, determine Latin Honor eligibility, and track scholarship maintenance requirements. Built with Manifest V3, it provides a seamless user experience for students to manage their academic data.

name: Space Shuttle Endeavor
description: A physics-driven space shuttle simulation that challenges players to navigate through orbital obstacles. Developed with Pygame, it features realistic shuttle movement, multi-stage rocket detachment mechanics (boosters and tank), and an immersive audio-visual experience. This project emphasizes accurate physics integration and dynamic object generation.

name: Pygame Picross
description: A faithful recreation of the classic 'Picross' (Nonograms) puzzle game developed using Pygame and NumPy. Features include a Level Editor (Creative Mode) for custom puzzle creation and a Solve Mode with intuitive grid-based interactions. Built as a foundational project to master game loop logic and state management.

name: Speed Type Pygame
description: A minimalist typing speed trainer inspired by typings.gg, designed for offline accessibility. Built with Pygame, it utilizes the GMK Dots color scheme for a sleek aesthetic. The application features real-time performance tracking, multiple difficulty modes, and a responsive typing engine.
